text:
The brilliant charity, Lucy Faithfull Foundation, is recruiting a Data Scientist/Analyst, to support their mission of preventing child sexual abuse. UK-based, Edinburgh or Espsom (hybrid).

<https://www.lucyfaithfull.org.uk/careers/data-scientist-analyst/>

There's a Q&A webinar about the role, team and context on Feb 3rd, 12-1pm UTC.
Deadline for applications 5pm on Feb 10th.

attachments.fallback: Lucy Faithfull Foundation: Data Scientist/Analyst - Lucy Faithfull Foundation
attachments.text: We really welcome informal conversations with prospective candidates about the role and the charity in advance of the deadline. Please contact Tom Fisher, Director of Research and Impact on 07958671905 or <mailto:tfisher@lucyfaithfull.org.uk|tfisher@lucyfaithfull.org.uk>. Previous applicants for this role need not reapply. Q&A webinarOur Director of Research and Impact, Tom Fisher, will be hosting a Meet & […]
